topic: Wheeled, rolling, and shape-changing robot locomotion
seed: Continuous Shape Changing Locomotion of 32-legged Spherical Robot
bonus: multi-robot or swarm variants score extra points

extra_papers.title: MonoRollBot: 3-DOF Spherical Robot with Underactuated Single Compliant Actuator Design
extra_papers.abstract: Underactuated spherical rolling robot with a single compliant actuator; inspection and exploration applications.

extra_papers.title: Full Nonlinear Nonholonomic Dynamics and Motion Analysis of a 3-DoF Underactuated Spherical Rolling Robot
extra_papers.abstract: Full nonlinear constrained dynamic model of a spherical rolling robot driven by one motor, lead-screw transmission, spring-coupled internal mass.

extra_papers.title: A Pillbug-Inspired Morphing Mechanism Covered with Sliding Shells
extra_papers.abstract: Morphing shell structure inspired by pillbugs; loop-coupled slider-crank mechanism for shape change.

extra_papers.title: FlipWalker: Jacob's Ladder toy-inspired robot for locomotion across diverse, complex terrain
extra_papers.abstract: Underactuated flipping locomotion for terrain where wheels struggle.

extra_papers.title: X2-N: A Transformable Wheel-legged Humanoid Robot with Dual-mode Locomotion and Manipulation
extra_papers.abstract: Transformable wheel-legged humanoid; dual-mode locomotion over continuous and discrete terrain.

extra_papers.title: Long-Distance Real-World Navigation of the Legged-Wheeled Robot Go2-W Using Deep Reinforcement Learning
extra_papers.abstract: Field deployment of a legged-wheeled robot navigating long real-world distances.

extra_papers.title: KYON: Semi-Modular Wheel-Legged Quadruped With Agile Bimanual Capability
extra_papers.abstract: Hybrid wheel-legged quadruped with bimanual upper body for loco-manipulation.

extra_papers.title: WiXus: A Wheeled-Legged Robot with Wire-Driven Environmental Utilizing to Integrate Mobility and Manipulation
extra_papers.abstract: Wheeled-legged robot with wire-driven environmental interaction.

seed_note: Anchor article is IEEE Spectrum coverage of a 32-legged spherical robot; the paper itself may not be on arXiv. Frame the review around the shape-changing/rolling/wheel-legged locomotion spectrum.
